result: If I could change the world in one way, it would be to eliminate poverty. By ensuring that everyone has access to basic needs such as food, clean water, education, and healthcare, we could significantly improve quality of life, reduce inequalities, and empower individuals to contribute positively to society. Ending poverty could also help address other global challenges, such as improving health outcomes, fostering peace, and promoting sustainability.
